message:
test(meta_skills): add comprehensive unit tests for meta_skills module

Add 95 new inline unit tests across 4 files:
- types.rs (48 new): MetaSkill validation, MetaSkillSliceRef, MetaSkillMetadata,
  MetaDisclosureLevel, PinStrategy, SliceCondition, MetaSkillDoc, serde roundtrips
- registry.rs (31 new): construction, insert, indexing, get, search (text/tags/
  tech_stack/combined), stats, MetaSkillQuery, is_meta_skill_file
- parser.rs (12 new): full parsing, pin strategies, conditions, disclosure levels,
  error cases, default values
- manager.rs (14 new): is_safe_relative_path, evaluate_all, SkipReason,
  SkippedSlice, ResolvedSlice, MetaSkillLoadResult

Total meta_skills tests: 103 (was 8)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
